query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS webauthn_credentials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agenteId INT NOT NULL,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  credentialId VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  credentialPublicKey TEXT NOT NULL,
  counter INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  deviceType VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'singleDevice',
  backedUp TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  transports VARCHAR(255),
  deviceName VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_webauthn_agenteId (agenteId),
  INDEX idx_webauthn_chaveJ (chaveJ)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS webauthn_credentials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agenteId INT NOT NULL,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  credentialId VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  credentialPublicKey TEXT NOT NULL,
  counter INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  deviceType VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'singleDevice',
  backedUp TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  transports VARCHAR(255),
  deviceName VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_webauthn_agenteId (agenteId),
  INDEX idx_webauthn_chaveJ (chaveJ)
);
